title: PUBLISH_KEY_PACKAGE: no size limit on key package blob
description: params.data in PUBLISH_KEY_PACKAGE is stored without any size validation. A 1 MiB WS frame (the max) goes directly to the key_packages table as a BLOB. Every subsequent GET_KEY_PACKAGE for that pub_id returns 1 MiB. At 100-member group with all devices publishing max blobs, get_all_key_packages returns 100 MiB. Enforce a per-blob cap (e.g. 1 KiB, matching real MLS key package sizes).
